explanation: This is the original true positive command with no mutation applied, used as a baseline for testing.
Inserted quotes around the --api URL to test parsing behavior while maintaining the same functionality.
Used equals signs (=) instead of spaces for some arguments to test alternative syntax parsing.
Replaced '--agent-type mesh' with '--agent-type workstation' to test substitution of equivalent agent types.
Reordered '--agent-type mesh' to test if the program accepts positional arguments in a different order.
Added a trailing '--' to indicate end of options, testing if the program accepts this as valid syntax.
Used short flags '-c' and '-s' as substitutes for '--client-id' and '--site-id' if supported by the program.
